---
title: "Data Cleaning and Preparation"
author: "James Thoburn"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document: 
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, comment = "")
```

## Load Libraries
```{r libraries}
library(tidyverse) # Allows us to easily manipulate and visualise data
library(janitor) # Helps us clean data
library(skimr) # Gives rich summaries of dataframes
library(visdat) # Visualises missing data patterns across the whole data at a glance
```

## Load Data
```{r load-data}
listings <- read_csv("data/raw/listings.csv.gz")
```
